## Change

- [ ] Add a project
- [ ] Correct an entry
- [ ] Remove or reclassify a project
- [ ] Improve the list structure or documentation

## Why

Explain how this change improves a compute decision.

## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- [ ] The official project or product URL is used.
- [ ] The entry is in one primary category.
- [ ] The description is one sentence and ends with a period.
- [ ] The entry includes a specific, fair trade-off.
- [ ] Claims are specific and supportable.
- [ ] The project is not already listed.
- [ ] The project has a tagged release and at least four months of public history, or I explained the exception.
- [ ] All affected links work.
